title: X-tra Recipes
description: A Minecraft mod that simply adds extra recipes.
body:
A mod that adds extra recipes.
the mod currently contains:
-totem of undying recipe
-spawner (block) recipe
-name tag recipe
-elytra recipe
-creeper spawn egg recipe
-pig spawn egg recipe
-chicken spawn egg recipe
This mod is made by the same person that made Rubies and X-tra stuff
to why i made this, i wanted to just, have a way to craft stuff. imagine this; u want to make a xp farm, but u wanna use spawners in the design. you dont have a silk touch pickaxe, and u havent ever found a spawner room. this mod's solution, craft it!
